# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: linkerd-config
  namespace: linkerd
data:
  config.yaml: |-
    admin:
      accessLogPath: stdout
    telemetry:
    - kind: prometheus
      port: 9090
    proxy:
      outboundConnectTimeoutMs: 1000
      policy:  
        trustDomain: cluster.local
        serverTls:
          requireClientCertificate: false

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      component: controller
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        component: controller
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: controller
        image: buoyantio/linkerd-controller:stable
        volumeMounts:
        - name: linkerd-config
          mountPath: /io.buoyant/config
      volumes:
      - name: linkerd-config
        configMap:
          name: linkerd-config
          items:
          - key: config.yaml
            path: config.yaml

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller-api
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  selector:
    component: controller
  ports:
  - name: destination
    port: 8086
    targetPort: 8086

---
apiVersion: admissionregistration.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: MutatingWebhookConfiguration
metadata:
  name: linkerd-webhooks
  namespace: linkerd
webhooks:
- name: linkerd.buoyant.io
  clientConfig:
    service:
      name: linkerd-controller-api
      namespace: linkerd
      path: "/"
    caBundle: $CA_BUNDLE
  rules:
  - operations: ["CREATE", "UPDATE"]
    apiGroups: [""]
    apiVersions: ["v1"]
    resources: ["pods"]
  admissionReviewVersions: ["v1beta1", "v1"]
  sideEffects: None
  timeoutSeconds: 5
  reinvocationPolicy: IfNeeded

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  ingress:
  - {}
  egress:
  - {}
